rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 11, 2014, Line 1: PLAINTIFF COMMUNITY REINVESTMENT FUND INC's Motion For Interlocutory Judgment: Hearing Requried to address the status of escrow. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALEM F MUFARREH VS. BERNARD DAVID WALTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order Filed By Plaintiff & Cross-Defendant Salem Mufarreh
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 11, 2014, Line 2: Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order: GRANTED subject to Plaintiff using garbage and grease containers no larger than 30 gallons in volume and storing them in the part of the ingress area that is at least 4.5 feet wide. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BARBARA DUTY VS. MARITZA HURTADO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Hearing On Plaintiff'S Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses To Special Interrogatories From Defendant Hurtado; Form Interrogatories From Hurtado; And For Monetary Sanctions; And Motion To Compel
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 11, 2014, Line 4: PLAINTIFF BARBARA DUTY's Motion To Compel Responses And Further Responses To Special Interrogatories and Form Interrogatories From Defendant Hurtado; And For Monetary Sanctions: Hearing Required. The parties are ordered to appear at 8:30 a.m. and engage in meaningful meet and confer efforts. The parties are to appear at 9:30 a.m. to inform the Court of their progress and to provide the Court with a list of discovery responses still at issue. (501/REQ)
